candidates.prompt: Dark premium Cashflow theme cold open, deep green and near-black palette. A single gold coin drops from above into a perfectly still black reflective surface, creating expanding concentric water ripples that glow in deep green. Cinematic lighting, slow motion, subtle water splash and ripple sounds, 8 seconds, 720p, native audio ON.

Dark premium Cashflow theme cold open, deep green and near-black palette. Abstract green glowing line graphs and financial skyline rising from a near-black void, forming a cityscape of data visualizations. Cinematic, slow build, subtle electronic hum and rising tone audio, 8 seconds, 720p, native audio ON.

Dark premium Cashflow theme cold open, deep green and near-black palette. A dollar bill transforms into glowing embers that rise and reform into a sharp upward-pointing green arrow. Dramatic lighting, cinematic, subtle crackling ember and whoosh sounds, 8 seconds, 720p, native audio ON.

candidates.concept: toppling credit-card dominoes to glowing compass
candidates.prompt: Dark premium Cashflow theme cold open, deep green and near-black palette. A row of credit cards topples like dominoes, the final card transforming into a glowing green compass that points upward. Cinematic lighting, dramatic slow motion, subtle card clack and resonant compass tone audio, 8 seconds, 720p, native audio ON.

Dark premium Cashflow theme cold open, deep green and near-black palette. An hourglass filled with coins instead of sand, coins flowing and accumulating in the bottom chamber while a green glow builds. Cinematic, slow motion, subtle coin clinks and sand-like flow audio, 8 seconds, 720p, native audio ON.

candidates.concept: compass needle snapping to a green-lit upward path
candidates.prompt: Dark premium Cashflow theme cold open, deep green and near-black palette. A compass needle spins wildly then snaps decisively to a glowing green upward path on the dial. Cinematic lighting, sharp motion, subtle metallic click and rising tone audio, 8 seconds, 720p, native audio ON.
